#  Apache Flink 1.20.5 Release Announcement
June 8, 2026 - Yunfeng Zhou
The Apache Flink Community is pleased to announce the fifth bug fix release of the Flink 1.20 series.
This release includes 4 bug fixes, vulnerability fixes, and minor…
